d6367f4c-4fee-4bd6-bbf2-d09fe636d5d9.name: Ops. Percentage of VM with CPU Ready
d6367f4c-4fee-4bd6-bbf2-d09fe636d5d9.formula: count( ${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=VirtualMachine, metric=cpu|readyPct, depth=2, where=">1"}) / ${this, metric=summary|number_running_vms}*100

c7b28474-211e-4173-8d55-d283ce26f764.name: Rightsize - Potential Memory Consumed Reclaimable (GB)
c7b28474-211e-4173-8d55-d283ce26f764.formula: ${this, metric=summary|oversized} && ${this, metric=mem|consumed_average} > ${this, metric=config|hardware|memoryKB} - ${this, metric=summary|oversized|memory} ? (${this, metric=mem|consumed_average} - (${this, metric=config|hardware|memoryKB} - ${this, metric=summary|oversized|memory}))/1024/1024 : 0

1865d4e2-00e4-4d8c-8ff5-04e084419d73.name: Guest Needed Memory is not collecting

822de086-4602-4031-ab7a-c46eccbeaa64.name: Count of ESXi 7.0.3 by vCenter
822de086-4602-4031-ab7a-c46eccbeaa64.description: Track deployments of ESXi 7.0 over time

ea9d7500-8703-453a-9d42-cdccf5b52461.name: Rightsize - Memory to Add to Undersized VMs

d3ad3d03-9ccf-4ad1-96dc-062abd8a8994.name: Count of UCS ESXi 7.0.3 by vCenter
d3ad3d03-9ccf-4ad1-96dc-062abd8a8994.formula: count(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, attribute=summary|version, depth=4, where=($value startsWith '7.0.3' && ${metric=Hardware|Vendor} startsWith 'Cisco')})
d3ad3d03-9ccf-4ad1-96dc-062abd8a8994.description: Track deployments of ESXi 7.0.3 over time

f72369a3-5145-45e8-9242-1742d6ac96d2.name: Rightsize - Memory to Remove from Oversized VMs

f20bb12a-dd82-4214-b704-4b73988afc0e.name: Ops. Hybrid vSAN KPI
f20bb12a-dd82-4214-b704-4b73988afc0e.formula: avg([   ${this, metric=kpi|diskGroupCongestionAbove60_count}                 as DG60                 >  10   ? 12.5 : ( DG60                 >   5 ? 37.5 : ( DG60                 >  1   ? 62.5 : 87.5 )),  ${this, metric=kpi|capacityDiskLatency_max}                          as CapaLatency          >   5   ? 12.5 : ( CapaLatency          >   3 ? 37.5 : ( CapaLatency          >  1   ? 62.5 : 87.5 )),  ${this, metric=kpi|diskGroupCongestion_max}                          as Congestion           > 200   ? 12.5 : ( Congestion           > 100 ? 37.5 : ( Congestion           > 60   ? 62.5 : 87.5 )),  ${this, metric=kpi|diskGroupCacheLatency_max}                        as CacheLatency         >   5   ? 12.5 : ( CacheLatency         >   3 ? 37.5 : ( CacheLatency         >  1   ? 62.5 : 87.5 )),    ${this, metric=kpi|diskGroupWriteBufferFree_min}                     as WriteBuffer          <  20   ? 12.5 : ( WriteBuffer          <  35 ? 37.5 : ( WriteBuffer          < 50   ? 62.5 : 87.5 )),   ${this, metric=kpi|diskGroupErrors_sum}                              as Errors               >   2   ? 12.5 : ( Errors               >   1 ? 37.5 : ( Errors               >  0   ? 62.5 : 87.5 )),    ${this, metric=kpi|diskGroupReadCacheHitRate_min} as CacheHit < 85 ? 12.5 : ( CacheHit < 90 ? 37.5 : ( CacheHit < 85 ? 62.5 : 87.5 ))  ,    ${this, metric=kpi|hostVMKernelPacketDropped_sum}                    as PacketDrop           >   2   ? 12.5 : ( PacketDrop           >   1 ? 37.5 : ( PacketDrop           >  0   ? 62.5 : 87.5 ))  ])

62aea573-c748-4a12-9235-dbe5babe37bd.name: Count of ESXi 6.5.0
62aea573-c748-4a12-9235-dbe5babe37bd.description: Track deployments of ESXi 6.5.0 over time

32eb60c3-694f-4fd9-b9e2-430ed3848768.name: Count of prior to ESXi 7.0.3
32eb60c3-694f-4fd9-b9e2-430ed3848768.formula: count(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, metric=summary|version, where="startsWith 7.0.2", depth=4}) + count(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, metric=summary|version, where="startsWith 7.0.1", depth=4}) + count(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, metric=summary|version, where="startsWith 7.0.0", depth=4}) + count(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, metric=summary|version, where="startsWith 6.0", depth=4})
32eb60c3-694f-4fd9-b9e2-430ed3848768.description: Track deployments of prior to ESXi 7.0.3 over time

8b3b71f5-82f6-4053-bdb8-a46a7ca9347c.name: Ops. VM KPI
8b3b71f5-82f6-4053-bdb8-a46a7ca9347c.formula: Avg ([   ${this, metric=cpu|usage_average}                                    as CPU_Usage      >     90 ? 12.5 : (CPU_Usage            >    80 ? 37.5 : (CPU_Usage            >   70 ? 62.5 : 87.5 )),         ${this, metric=cpu|readyPct}                                         as CPU_Ready      >    7.5 ? 12.5 : (CPU_Ready            >     5 ? 37.5 : (CPU_Ready            >  2.5 ? 62.5 : 87.5 )),         ${this, metric=cpu|costopPct}                                        as CPU_CoStop     >    7.5 ? 12.5 : (CPU_CoStop           >     5 ? 37.5 : (CPU_CoStop           >  2.5 ? 62.5 : 87.5 )),         ${this, metric=mem|host_contentionPct}                               as RAM_Contention >      5 ? 12.5 : (RAM_Contention       >     3 ? 37.5 : (RAM_Contention       >    1 ? 62.5 : 87.5 )),     ${this, metric=virtualDisk:Aggregate of all instances|totalLatency}  as Disk_Latency   >     30 ? 12.5 : (Disk_Latency         >    20 ? 37.5 : (Disk_Latency         >   10 ? 62.5 : 87.5 ))     ])

7e1207da-02b4-4e05-8baf-d0e42e6b1319.name: Max VM CPU Contention (%) in a Cluster

0ccf0ff4-a279-42f4-8abe-8dcbafee5bae.name: Ops. Percentage of VM with CPU CoStop
0ccf0ff4-a279-42f4-8abe-8dcbafee5bae.formula: count(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=VirtualMachine, metric=cpu|costopPct, depth=2, where=">0.5"}) / ${this, metric=summary|number_running_vms}*100

d5ba4f62-dd17-4938-988f-cb1bdd509aa2.name: Max VM Aggregate Disk Latency (ms) in a Cluster

fc3b222a-c19a-4db5-9cf2-33745780daf6.name: Max VM Memory Contention (%) in a Cluster

bd812200-4794-4cc3-9e1f-2daead31d7b5.name: Ops. Percentage of VM with RAM Contention
bd812200-4794-4cc3-9e1f-2daead31d7b5.formula: count( ${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=VirtualMachine, metric=mem|host_contentionPct, depth=5, where=">0.25"}) / ${this, metric=summary|number_running_vms}*100

0e3d6099-d2a3-49b4-8c65-b84aea91e0e7.name: Rightsize - Potential Cost Savings
0e3d6099-d2a3-49b4-8c65-b84aea91e0e7.formula: ( max( ${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=ClusterComputeResource, metric=cost|allocation|allocationBasedCpuBaseRate, depth=-2} ) > 0 ? ${this, metric=summary|oversized|vcpus} * max( ${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=ClusterComputeResource, metric=cost|allocation|allocationBasedCpuBaseRate, depth=-2} ) : ${this, metric=Super Metric|sm_ab378c76-0dce-4c09-ad8d-1c9ff8540882} * max( ${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=ClusterComputeResource, metric=cost|cpuBaseRate, depth=-2} ) ) + ( max( ${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=ClusterComputeResource, metric=cost|allocation|allocationBasedMemoryBaseRate, depth=-2} ) > 0 ? ( ${this, metric=summary|oversized|memory}/1024/1024 ) * max( ${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=ClusterComputeResource, metric=cost|allocation|allocationBasedMemoryBaseRate, depth=-2} ) : ${this, metric=Super Metric|sm_c7b28474-211e-4173-8d55-d283ce26f764} * max( ${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=ClusterComputeResource, metric=cost|memoryBaseRate, depth=-2} ) )

89cd8f91-2bd0-417e-8e2c-c4eeb2200f65.name: Rightsize - Potential Cost Increase
89cd8f91-2bd0-417e-8e2c-c4eeb2200f65.formula: ( max( ${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=ClusterComputeResource, metric=cost|allocation|allocationBasedCpuBaseRate, depth=-2} ) > 0 ? ${this, metric=summary|undersized|vcpus} * max( ${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=ClusterComputeResource, metric=cost|allocation|allocationBasedCpuBaseRate, depth=-2} ) : ${this, metric=Super Metric|sm_f969e72d-7775-44d7-973a-c92319fcd08b} * max( ${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=ClusterComputeResource, metric=cost|cpuBaseRate, depth=-2} ) ) + ( max( ${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=ClusterComputeResource, metric=cost|allocation|allocationBasedMemoryBaseRate, depth=-2} ) > 0 ? ( ${this, metric=summary|undersized|memory}/1024/1024 ) * max( ${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=ClusterComputeResource, metric=cost|allocation|allocationBasedMemoryBaseRate, depth=-2} ) : ${this, metric=Super Metric|sm_bac94c64-ebd3-40a6-992e-7fd1b4d480b4} * max( ${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=ClusterComputeResource, metric=cost|memoryBaseRate, depth=-2} ) )

371065ff-7af0-4a81-b938-4789b045ec46.name: Count of ESXi 6.0.0
371065ff-7af0-4a81-b938-4789b045ec46.description: Track deployments of ESXi 6.0.0 over time

0b77c556-2f28-4618-9f04-de2ab5a373f1.name: Count of UCS ESXi prior to 7.0.3 by vCenter
0b77c556-2f28-4618-9f04-de2ab5a373f1.formula: count(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, attribute=summary|version, depth=4, where=($value startsWith '6.0' && ${metric=Hardware|Vendor} startsWith 'Cisco')}) + count(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, attribute=summary|version, depth=4, where=($value startsWith '6.5' && ${metric=Hardware|Vendor} startsWith 'Cisco')}) + count(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, attribute=summary|version, depth=4, where=($value startsWith '7.0.0' && ${metric=Hardware|Vendor} startsWith 'Cisco')}) + count(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, attribute=summary|version, depth=4, where=($value startsWith '7.0.1' && ${metric=Hardware|Vendor} startsWith 'Cisco')}) + count(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, attribute=summary|version, depth=4, where=($value startsWith '7.0.2' && ${metric=Hardware|Vendor} startsWith 'Cisco')})

910b38b3-c8ee-4f1d-9bc9-ea57f632c4a0.name: Count of UCS ESXi 7.0.3
910b38b3-c8ee-4f1d-9bc9-ea57f632c4a0.formula: count(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, attribute=summary|version, depth=4, where=($value startsWith '7.0.3' && ${metric=Hardware|Vendor} startsWith 'Cisco')})
910b38b3-c8ee-4f1d-9bc9-ea57f632c4a0.description: Track deployments of ESXi 7.0.3 over time

076754ce-12ad-4872-ad94-6664503263e1.name: VM Uptime
076754ce-12ad-4872-ad94-6664503263e1.formula: count(${this, metric=summary|runtime|powerState, where="summary|runtime|powerState contains Powered On"}) * ceil( min([ max([${this, metric=sys|osUptime_latest}, ${this, metric=mem|workload} , ${this, metric=virtualDisk:Aggregate of all instances|commandsAveraged_average} , ${this, metric=net|transmitted_average}                   ]) , 1])) * Min([ 300 , ${this, metric=sys|osUptime_latest}]) / 3
076754ce-12ad-4872-ad94-6664503263e1.description: Ignite Super Metric for VM Uptime

1e33a024-3428-42fe-93b1-84256bf062e1.name: Count of UCS ESXi prior to 7.0.3
1e33a024-3428-42fe-93b1-84256bf062e1.formula: count(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, attribute=summary|version, depth=4, where=($value startsWith '6.0' && ${metric=Hardware|Vendor} startsWith 'Cisco')}) + count(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, attribute=summary|version, depth=4, where=($value startsWith '6.5' && ${metric=Hardware|Vendor} startsWith 'Cisco')}) + count(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, attribute=summary|version, depth=4, where=($value startsWith '7.0.0' && ${metric=Hardware|Vendor} startsWith 'Cisco')}) + count(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, attribute=summary|version, depth=4, where=($value startsWith '7.0.1' && ${metric=Hardware|Vendor} startsWith 'Cisco')}) + count(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, attribute=summary|version, depth=4, where=($value startsWith '7.0.2' && ${metric=Hardware|Vendor} startsWith 'Cisco')})

9df8638e-1844-4b41-97bc-ae114ad87f75.name: Count of ESXi 7.0.x by vCenter
9df8638e-1844-4b41-97bc-ae114ad87f75.description: Track deployments of ESXi 7.0 over time

397791d7-d388-4e57-916b-e08d77656b29.name: Count of ESXi 7.0.x
397791d7-d388-4e57-916b-e08d77656b29.description: Track deployments of ESXi 7.0 over time

ad36a282-5860-4a11-8e21-16c21e174c67.name: NUMA Optimal VM Cores per Socket
ad36a282-5860-4a11-8e21-16c21e174c67.formula: ceil(${this, metric=config|hardware|numCpu})/((${this, metric=config|hardware|memoryKB}/1024/1024) <= (sum(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, metric=hardware|memorySize, depth=-1})/1024/1024)/sum(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, attribute=hardware|cpuInfo|numCpuPackages, depth=-1})      ?  ((${this, metric=config|hardware|numCpu} as vmCPUs) % 2           ?  vmCPUs          : vmCPUs + 1)  <=     (sum(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, attribute=hardware|cpuInfo|numCpuCores, depth=-1}) / sum(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, metric=hardware|cpuInfo|numCpuPackages,      depth=-1}))           ?             1           : ceil(vmCPUs/(sum(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, attribute=hardware|cpuInfo|numCpuCores, depth=-1}) / sum(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, metric=hardware|cpuInfo|numCpuPackages, depth=-1})))     : ceil((${this, metric=config|hardware|memoryKB}/1024/1024) / ((sum(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, metric=hardware|memorySize, depth=-1})/1024/1024)/sum(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, attribute=hardware|cpuInfo|numCpuPackages, depth=-1}))))

13a4d9ca-5271-47db-9478-14c4b7d1f02a.name: Count of UCS ESXi 6.5.0
13a4d9ca-5271-47db-9478-14c4b7d1f02a.formula: count(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, attribute=summary|version, depth=4, where=($value startsWith '6.5.0' && ${metric=Hardware|Vendor} startsWith 'Cisco')})
13a4d9ca-5271-47db-9478-14c4b7d1f02a.description: Track deployments of ESXi 6.5.0 over time

756abea8-c722-47e0-94ab-df3b767bcf19.name: Count of ESXi 6.7.0 by vCenter
756abea8-c722-47e0-94ab-df3b767bcf19.description: Track deployments of ESXi 6.7.0 over time

88ce6c62-20be-495f-a724-6a7285994a65.name: Ops. Cluster KPI
88ce6c62-20be-495f-a724-6a7285994a65.formula: avg([   ${this, metric=Super Metric|sm_5efb039b-4740-462b-a8eb-9ba0b2f9108d} as MaxCPUReady          > 10   ? 12.5 : ( MaxCPUReady          >  5 ? 37.5 : ( MaxCPUReady          >  1   ? 62.5 : 87.5 )),   ${this, metric=Super Metric|sm_bb35ec23-6079-4d82-9730-3743ed682387} as MaxCoStop            > 10   ? 12.5 : ( MaxCoStop            >  5 ? 37.5 : ( MaxCoStop            >  1   ? 62.5 : 87.5 )),   ${this, metric=mem|max_vm_mem_contention}                            as MaxRAMContention     >  5   ? 12.5 : ( MaxRAMContention     >  3 ? 37.5 : ( MaxRAMContention     >  1   ? 62.5 : 87.5 )),   ${this, metric=Super Metric|sm_d6367f4c-4fee-4bd6-bbf2-d09fe636d5d9} as ReadyPercentage      >  7.5 ? 12.5 : ( ReadyPercentage      >  5 ? 37.5 : ( ReadyPercentage      >  2.5 ? 62.5 : 87.5 )),   ${this, metric=Super Metric|sm_0ccf0ff4-a279-42f4-8abe-8dcbafee5bae} as CoStopPercentage     >  7.5 ? 12.5 : ( CoStopPercentage     >  5 ? 37.5 : ( CoStopPercentage     >  2.5 ? 62.5 : 87.5 )), ${this, metric=Super Metric|sm_bd812200-4794-4cc3-9e1f-2daead31d7b5} as RAMContentPercentage >  7.5 ? 12.5 : ( RAMContentPercentage >  5 ? 37.5 : ( RAMContentPercentage >  2.5 ? 62.5 : 87.5 )), ${this, metric=cpu|demand|max_host_workload}                         as MaxESXiCPUDemand     > 90   ? 12.5 : ( MaxESXiCPUDemand     > 85 ? 37.5 : ( MaxESXiCPUDemand     > 80   ? 62.5 : 87.5 )), ${this, metric=mem|consumed|max_host_workload}                       as MaxESXiRAMConsumed   > 95   ? 12.5 : ( MaxESXiRAMConsumed   > 90 ? 37.5 : ( MaxESXiRAMConsumed   > 85   ? 62.5 : 87.5 )),  ${this, metric=mem|demand|max_host_workload}                         as MaxESXiRAMActive     > 65   ? 12.5 : ( MaxESXiRAMActive     > 60 ? 37.5 : ( MaxESXiRAMActive     > 55   ? 62.5 : 87.5 )), ${this, metric=net:physical|droppedPct}                              as PacketDropped        >  2   ? 12.5 : ( PacketDropped        >  1 ? 37.5 : ( PacketDropped        >  0   ? 62.5 : 87.5 )) ])

f5f0adac-981c-4e24-825f-2069b49bf2ed.name: Count of ESXi 7.0.3
f5f0adac-981c-4e24-825f-2069b49bf2ed.description: Track deployments of ESXi 7.0 over time

49855c83-3744-438f-8fbc-954c87497649.name: Rightsize - vCPUs to Add to Undersized VMs

d6d21496-971e-46d1-b583-2742da31ce46.name: Ops. All Flash vSAN KPI
d6d21496-971e-46d1-b583-2742da31ce46.formula: avg([   ${this, metric=kpi|diskGroupCongestionAbove60_count}                 as DG60                 >  10   ? 12.5 : ( DG60                 >   5 ? 37.5 : ( DG60                 >  1   ? 62.5 : 87.5 )),  ${this, metric=kpi|capacityDiskLatency_max}                          as CapaLatency          >   5   ? 12.5 : ( CapaLatency          >   3 ? 37.5 : ( CapaLatency          >  1   ? 62.5 : 87.5 )),  ${this, metric=kpi|diskGroupCongestion_max}                          as Congestion           > 200   ? 12.5 : ( Congestion           > 100 ? 37.5 : ( Congestion           > 60   ? 62.5 : 87.5 )),  ${this, metric=kpi|diskGroupCacheLatency_max}                        as CacheLatency         >   5   ? 12.5 : ( CacheLatency         >   3 ? 37.5 : ( CacheLatency         >  1   ? 62.5 : 87.5 )),   ${this, metric=kpi|diskGroupWriteBufferFree_min}                     as WriteBuffer          <  20   ? 12.5 : ( WriteBuffer          <  35 ? 37.5 : ( WriteBuffer          < 50   ? 62.5 : 87.5 )),  ${this, metric=kpi|diskGroupErrors_sum}                              as Errors               >   2   ? 12.5 : ( Errors               >   1 ? 37.5 : ( Errors               >  0   ? 62.5 : 87.5 )),  ${this, metric=kpi|hostVMKernelPacketDropped_sum}                    as PacketDrop           >   2   ? 12.5 : ( PacketDrop           >   1 ? 37.5 : ( PacketDrop           >  0   ? 62.5 : 87.5 ))  ])

06794141-f9ae-480b-b98c-d2d6ac83748c.name: Count of ESXi 6.0.0 by vCenter
06794141-f9ae-480b-b98c-d2d6ac83748c.description: Track deployments of ESXi 6.0.0 over time

7683bcf3-26c7-4f5e-ac0d-e214d718128a.name: NUMA Optimal VM Sockets
7683bcf3-26c7-4f5e-ac0d-e214d718128a.formula: (${this, metric=config|hardware|memoryKB}/1024/1024) <= (sum(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, metric=hardware|memorySize, depth=-1})/1024/1024)/sum(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, attribute=hardware|cpuInfo|numCpuPackages, depth=-1})      ?  ((${this, metric=config|hardware|numCpu} as vmCPUs) % 2           ?  vmCPUs          : vmCPUs + 1)  <=     (sum(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, attribute=hardware|cpuInfo|numCpuCores, depth=-1}) / sum(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, metric=hardware|cpuInfo|numCpuPackages,      depth=-1}))           ?             1           : ceil(vmCPUs/(sum(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, attribute=hardware|cpuInfo|numCpuCores, depth=-1}) / sum(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, metric=hardware|cpuInfo|numCpuPackages, depth=-1})))     : ceil((${this, metric=config|hardware|memoryKB}/1024/1024) / ((sum(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, metric=hardware|memorySize, depth=-1})/1024/1024)/sum(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, attribute=hardware|cpuInfo|numCpuPackages, depth=-1})))

e0ca8714-e19c-41e3-b446-4e78fd66f306.name: VM Number of Snapshots Older than Two Days

c0e07f55-de6c-4e2f-ae7d-061f22ddd36a.name: Count of ESXi 6.7.0
c0e07f55-de6c-4e2f-ae7d-061f22ddd36a.description: Track deployments of ESXi 6.7.0 over time

1aa6f2d0-f701-41b7-8db9-1094c73b1414.name: Max VM Dropped Packet in a Cluster

8669afb0-4680-4008-94c1-9a020254292f.name: Count of ESXi 6.5.0 by vCenter
8669afb0-4680-4008-94c1-9a020254292f.description: Track deployments of ESXi 6.5.0 over time

e00bac67-9a22-4276-8e47-546daf71072f.name: Rightsize - vCPUs to Remove from Oversized VMs

dce0f070-6750-4ca8-a928-5fee540ddeff.name: Ops. Cluster KPI with vSAN KPI
dce0f070-6750-4ca8-a928-5fee540ddeff.formula: avg ([  ${adaptertype=VirtualAndPhysicalSANAdapter, objecttype=VirtualSANDCCluster, metric=Super Metric|sm_d6d21496-971e-46d1-b583-2742da31ce46, depth=1},   ${adaptertype=VirtualAndPhysicalSANAdapter, objecttype=VirtualSANDCCluster, metric=Super Metric|sm_f20bb12a-dd82-4214-b704-4b73988afc0e, depth=1}, ${this, metric=Super Metric|sm_88ce6c62-20be-495f-a724-6a7285994a65} ])

a860dfea-71ab-45fc-a3be-f92b1192551a.name: Count of prior to ESXi 7.0.3 by vCenter
a860dfea-71ab-45fc-a3be-f92b1192551a.formula: count(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, metric=summary|version, where="startsWith 7.0.2", depth=4}) + count(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, metric=summary|version, where="startsWith 7.0.1", depth=4}) + count(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, metric=summary|version, where="startsWith 7.0.0", depth=4}) + count(${adaptertype=VMWARE, objecttype=HostSystem, metric=summary|version, where="startsWith 6.0", depth=4})
a860dfea-71ab-45fc-a3be-f92b1192551a.description: Track deployments of prior to ESXi 7.0.3 over time
